content:
✨ guarddog | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To scan and identify malicious software packages within the software supply chain across multiple programming language ecosystems.
✨ Key Features: • Identifies malicious PyPI and npm packages • Supports Go modules, RubyGems, GitHub actions, and VSCode extensions • Scans local or remote packages
📖 Summary: GuardDog is a command-line interface (CLI) tool designed to identify malicious packages across various ecosystems including PyPI, npm, Go, RubyGems, GitHub Actions, and VSCode extensions. It employs heuristics and Semgrep rules to analyze both package source code and metadata for potential threats.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
